runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (22.55) over 388m at this track. With a good start can take advantage of the low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (22.92) at this track over 388m. Has been racing well enough. Among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (22.40) at this track over 388m. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.98) when seventh over 388m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. Will need the right run.

runners.formComment: Disappointed last time but just missed the placings two back over 388m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

runners.formComment: Placed last time (22.50) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 3 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Among the chances on best.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 22.82, beating Pineapple Frida. Last start finished 4th over 388m at this track beaten 5 lengths (22.58) behind Ruby Juan in a Grade 5 on April 7. Looks tested in this company.

runners.formComment: Scored by 1.5 lengths last time (22.29) in a Grade 5 over 388m at this track. Strong record off the draw with two wins and two minors from five starts. Expected to go close.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 388m at this track. This looks too tough.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on March 24 over 388m at this track behind Speed Dial beaten 14 lengths (23.63). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.
